Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Renewal Of Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-29-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. WILLIAM BELLOR-YEH, Esq. of Winn Law Group (Tel: 714-446-6686) for plaintiff;
No other appearances are made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT JAMES POOLE's Motion To Vacate Renewal Of Judgment.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

James Poole's unopposed "motion to vacate renewal of judgment" is granted.

Order signed.
